name: SpeakToAdviser
description: Customer wants to speak to a human agent, adviser, or representative — they have not provided any other details about their issue. This intent fires when the customer's sole request is to be transferred to a person, without specifying a topic. If the customer mentions a specific issue alongside the agent request, the topic-specific intent should fire instead.

sampleUtterances.utterance: Can I speak to a {agentSlot} ?
{agentSlot} please
Transfer me to a {agentSlot}
I want to talk to a {agentSlot}
Get me a {agentSlot}
I don't want to speak to a bot — put me through to a {agentSlot}
Can you connect me to a {agentSlot} ?
I just want to speak to a {agentSlot} — I don't want to go through menus
Is there a {agentSlot} I can chat to?
Pass me to a {agentSlot}
Stop — I need a {agentSlot}
I'd rather speak to a {agentSlot} than use the bot
I need a real {agentSlot} not an automated system
How do I get through to a {agentSlot} ?
You're not helping — let me speak to a {agentSlot}
I've already tried the bot and it can't help — give me a {agentSlot}
Can I be transferred to a {agentSlot} please?
I'd like to speak to someone in person
This isn't working — I need to speak to someone
{agentSlot}
